data.title: LighthouseIQ Delivers 40x Faster Time to Insight, Saving Millions in Review Costs
data.description: A company named Lighthouse has announced that their product, LighthouseIQ, has been proven to provide tangible cost savings, quicker access to insights, and increased control in the discovery process.

data.title: Rigaku Launches NEX QC II Series Benchtop XRF Analyzers for Industrial QC at Pittcon 2026
data.description: Applied Rigaku Technologies, a division of Rigaku group, headquartered in Akishima, Tokyo and led by CEO Jun Kawakami, has introduced its latest NEX QC II Series benchtop X-ray fluorescence (XRF) analyzers at Pittcon 2026 in San Antonio, Texas, USA. Pittcon, a leading global conference for laboratory science and analytical instrumentation, took place from March 7 to March 11. The NEX QC II Series represents a new generation of energy dispersive XRF (EDXRF) analyzers.

data.title: Equilar ExecAtlas Partners with SalesIntel to Close Executive Data Gap
data.description: Equilar ExecAtlas, based in Redwood City, California, has partnered with SalesIntel, a pipeline generation platform popular among enterprise GTM teams. This collaboration combines executive intelligence from ExecAtlas with verified buying committee contact information from SalesIntel. The integration allows Salesforce users to have comprehensive executive profiles, verified contact details, and discover warm introduction opportunities within important accounts. This partnership aims to enhance the efficiency of reaching out to key decision-makers.

data.title: Saxton & Stump Establishes Director of Applied AI Role to Accelerate Client Value and Innovation
data.description: In Malvern, Pennsylvania, Saxton & Stump has announced the creation of a new role, Director of Applied AI, aimed at boosting client value and fostering innovation. This move is part of the firm's commitment to utilizing artificial intelligence in legal services.

data.title: Kira and Lovable Launch Vibe Coding Course, Bringing AI-Powered App Building to Classrooms
data.description: In New York, Kira, the pioneer AI Operating System for Education, has revealed a significant collaboration with Lovable, the prominent AI app creation platform. This partnership aims to introduce a novel course on AI-driven software development. The course, utilizing Kira's AI-centric course creation tools, seamlessly meshes with Lovable's development platform. This comprehensive course equips students with a progressive journey from basic AI understanding to practical product development. This venture is set to benefit educators and institutions by offering a new educational pathway in the field of AI.

data.title: Analyst Research Firms Embrace AI Experimentation Amid Increasing Client Expectations, New Survey Finds
data.description: In Cambridge, England, Content Catalyst's latest Analyst Research Survey for 2026 indicates a significant industry-wide trend towards the adoption of AI technology. The survey highlights growing concerns within the industry regarding potential competition stemming from the emergence of low-cost AI tools. This shift towards AI adoption is shaping the business landscape, with businesses recognizing the importance of integrating artificial intelligence into their operations. The survey data underscores the increasing prevalence of AI in various sectors and the need for companies to leverage this technology to remain competitive.

data.title: SolarWinds Recognized As A 5 Star Program In The 2026 CRN® Partner Program Guide
data.description: SolarWinds, a renowned provider of observability and IT management software, was recently recognized in the 2026 CRN Partner Program Guide by CRN®, a part of The Channel Company. This recognition signifies SolarWinds' commitment to offering valuable and tailored vendor partner programs for solution providers. The guide serves as a crucial reference for partners looking for programs that align with their business objectives and provide significant value. In a competitive landscape marked by changing customer needs and emerging technologies, SolarWinds stands out as a trusted partner for solution providers.
